name: Internal Attack Detection - High Volume from Single Source (SIEM Correlation Needed)
description: Detects a high number of attack or intrusion alerts originating from the same internal source IP and targeting the same internal destination IP within a short timeframe, indicating lateral movement, a compromised host, or an insider threat.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of one of the internal attack events (e.g., the most recent one).

parameters.name: SourceIp
parameters.description: The source IP address of the attacking internal host.

parameters.name: DestinationIp
parameters.description: The destination IP address of the targeted internal host.

parameters.name: SourcePort
parameters.description: The source port of the connection associated with the attack, if available.

parameters.name: DestinationPort
parameters.description: The destination port of the connection associated with the attack, if available.

parameters.name: Protocol
parameters.description: The network protocol used in the attack (e.g., TCP, UDP), if available.

parameters.name: AttackType
parameters.description: The name/type of the detected attack signature/pattern (e.g., 'SQL Injection', 'Shellcode').

parameters.name: Action
parameters.description: The action taken by the security device (e.g., 'detected', 'alerted', 'intrusion').

parameters.name: RuleId
parameters.description: The ID of the IDS/IPS rule that triggered the alert, if available.

parameters.name: DeviceName
parameters.description: The name of the IDS/IPS device reporting the alert, if available.

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The name of the Sigma rule that triggered the event, if applicable.

parameters.name: SIEM_COUNT_OF_EVENTS
parameters.description: The count of internal attack events aggregated by the SIEM (e.g., 15).

parameters.name: SIEM_TIMEFRAME
parameters.description: The time window over which the events were counted (e.g., '5 minutes').

parameters.name: SIEM_FIRST_EVENT_TIMESTAMP
parameters.description: The timestamp of the first event in the correlated group.

parameters.name: SIEM_LAST_EVENT_TIMESTAMP
parameters.description: The timestamp of the last event in the correlated group.
